child_sections.title: TRP1 Challenge – Interim Submission Report
child_sections.summary: TRP1 Challenge – Interim Submission Report Architecting the AInNative IDE & IntentnCode Traceability 1. Overview This interim submission documents the VS Code extension architecture, the agent design, and the hook system used to enforce safety, traceability, and intentntoncode accountability. The

child_sections.title: Key decisions:
child_sections.summary: Key decisions: (cid:127) Hooks must be deterministic and always run in the same order. (cid:127) PreToolUse hook enforces safety policy (block dangerous commands). (cid:127) PostToolUse hook writes trace logs for auditability. (cid:127) Artifacts are stored in a sidecar directory .orchestration/
